examples: They isolated the political prisoners from the other inmates
The chemist managed to isolate the compound
The dentist sequesters the tooth he is working on

meanings.definition: separate (experiences) from the emotions relating to them
being or feeling set or kept apart from others; ; - Sherwood Anderson
examples: she felt detached from the group
could not remain the isolated figure he had been
thought of herself as alone and separated from the others

meanings.definition: marked by separation of or from usually contiguous elements; - Scientific Monthly
examples: little isolated worlds, as abruptly disjunct and unexpected as a palm-shaded well in the Sahara
several stranded fish in a tide pool

meanings.definition: under forced isolation especially for health reasons
remote and separate physically or socially; ; - W.H.Hudson
examples: existed over the centuries as a world apart
preserved because they inhabited a place apart
tiny isolated villages remote from centers of civilization
